description: Style NoteUnderstated colouring on the base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy yet elegant. They can be worn with ethnic Indian wear as well as with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta and some ethnic accessories.Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a thong style strap with a square patch of crystal embellishmentsSilver footbed with silver details Ankle loop with a buckleHas TPR outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
